response:
To find the **characteristic polynomial** of a $ 3 \times 3 $ matrix $ A $, we compute the determinant of the matrix:

$$
A - \lambda I
$$

where $ I $ is the $ 3 \times 3 $ identity matrix, and $ \lambda $ is a scalar (the eigenvalue).

---

### Step 1: Write the matrix $ A - \lambda I $

Given:
$$
A = \begin{pmatrix}
\frac{189}{16} & -\frac{27}{4} & \frac{83}{8} \\
\frac{39}{8} & -\frac{43}{8} & -\frac{41}{16} \\
\frac{21}{16} & \frac{213}{16} & \frac{35}{8}
\end{pmatrix}
$$

Then:
$$
A - \lambda I = \begin{pmatrix}
\frac{189}{16} - \lambda & -\frac{27}{4} & \frac{83}{8} \\
\frac{39}{8} & -\frac{43}{8} - \lambda & -\frac{41}{16} \\
\frac{21}{16} & \frac{213}{16} & \frac{35}{8} - \lambda
\end{pmatrix}
$$

---

### Step 2: Compute the determinant

$$
\det(A - \lambda I) = \begin{vmatrix}
\frac{189}{16} - \lambda & -\frac{27}{4} & \frac{83}{8} \\
\frac{39}{8} & -\frac{43}{8} - \lambda & -\frac{41}{16} \\
\frac{21}{16} & \frac{213}{16} & \frac{35}{8} - \lambda
\end{vmatrix}
$$

We can compute this determinant directly.

---
